Commit:     Philip Paeps <philip@FreeBSD.org>

    Update information about the clusteradm team

    Correctly reflect the current membership of the clusteradm team.  While
    here, document the existence of gitadm@.  Also encourage use of specific
    aliases and Bugzilla for reporting issues with the cluster.

    PR:             259760
    Reported by:    ygy
